title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino and Acting Municipal Treasurer Maria Luisa G. Diaz to Close the Special Education Fund (SEF) Time Deposit with Account Number 1891-1178-30 and to Transfer the Fund Closing Balances of the Said Time Deposit Upon Maturity to the Sef Current Account No. 1892-1020-89. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 11/28/2022)
